neighbors.name: John Barnes & Shelley Barnes
neighbors.claims: Public records indicate that Assessor’s Parcel Number 106-48-003 is located in Yavapai County, Arizona (specifically Prescott), not Cochise County ([Realtor.com](https://www.realtor.com/realestateandhomes-detail/1684-St-Andrews-Way_Prescott_AZ_86301_M13449-05598)). No property records or public engagement history could be verified for a "John and Shelley Barnes" in Cochise County. A John Barnes previously served as Chief Investigator for the Cochise County Attorney's Office in the 1980s ([NCJRS](https://www.ojp.gov/pdffiles1/Digitization/85737NCJRS.pdf)), but no current evidence links this individual to a Shelley Barnes or recent land ownership in the county.

approach_recommendations.engage: Verify the correct identity and location of this stakeholder, as the provided parcel number corresponds to a property in Yavapai County, not Cochise.

neighbors.verification_notes: CRITICAL DATA MISMATCH: The provided parcel number (106-48-003) exists in Yavapai County (Prescott), not Cochise County. No record of 'John and Shelley Barnes' found in Cochise County property or voter records. A 'John Barnes' appears in older county employment records (Investigator), but no spouse named Shelley was found. Profile likely contains incorrect geographic data.
